text:
is an artbook by Yoshiyuki Sadamoto published by Kadokawa Shoten on 26 March 2009 (Limited Edition) and on 26 August 2010 (Regular).

Overview

The book presents a large collection of illustrations made by Yoshiyuki Sadamoto for all the works to which he contributed. It includes illustrations of ', 
', ', ' and ' series. As part of the Evangelion franchise, there are illustrations for Neon Genesis Evangelion and Rebuild of Evangelion, but also the Neon Genesis Evangelion manga.
